calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Appearance And Examination Of Elaine Chan Re Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaye Hester (Counsel for Elaine Chan); Jeralyn A. Seiling (Counsel for Michael Korbholz, Executor); Elaine Chan (present in Court).

Ms. Seiling provided a summary of Ms. Chan's testimony thus far. Ms. Hester provided additional information. After further discussion by and among counsel and the Court concerning damages, the Court found that Ms. Chan's testimony was not too believable with respect to her contention that she lacked notice of the claim and assessed damages as follows: interest from the date of the over-payment at the legal rate of 10% per annum and $2,000.00 pursuant to Probate Code Section 859. Ms Seiling is to prepare the Order.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Appearance And Examination Of Elaine Chan Re Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Nicole Howell and Jeralyn Seiling appearing for executor Michael Korbholz. Elaine Chan, owner of 450 Sutter Pharmacy is in Court. Ms. Chan wants a continuance to get an attorney. Counsel argued that she was notified some time ago of this proceeding. Court is willing to continue this matter for one week. Ms. Chan is not available on 12/20 and the Court wants to go forward today.
Elaine Chan sworn and examined. Matter is continued to 1/10/07 at 11:00am. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition To Issue Citation To Compel Appearance And Examination Under Oath Of Person Believed To Have Wrongfully Submitted And Accepted Payment Of A Creditor'S Claim
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeralyn Seiling (Counsel for Michael Korbholz, Personal Representative).

Ms. Seiling reported on her efforts, and those of others, to contact Elaine Chan without success. Consequently, the Court granted the Petition to Issue Citation, signing the Order for same in open court. Subsequent to the hearing, the date for the appearance and examination of Ms. Chan was set for December 13, 2006 at 11:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.
